items.title: Take our I/O 2026 quiz, vibe coded in Google AI Studio.
items.content: We used Google AI Studio to vibe code a quiz about our top I/O 2026 announcements.
items.contentSnippet: We used Google AI Studio to vibe code a quiz about our top I/O 2026 announcements.
items.summary: 我们利用Google AI Studio制作了一款关于I/O 2026重点发布的趣味问答测验。该测验通过AI技术实现，旨在展示相关内容。

items.title: 9 demos of Gemini Omni and Gemini 3.5 in action
items.content: Watch 9 videos showing the capabilities of Gemini Omni and Gemini 3.5, announced at Google I/O 2026.
items.contentSnippet: Watch 9 videos showing the capabilities of Gemini Omni and Gemini 3.5, announced at Google I/O 2026.
items.summary: 文章展示了9个视频，演示了在Google I/O 2026大会上发布的Gemini Omni和Gemini 3.5的功能。

items.title: Check out real-life AI prototypes from the Futures Lab.
items.content: University of Waterloo students develop AI prototypes like sign language tutors to reshape the future of education and work.
items.contentSnippet: University of Waterloo students develop AI prototypes like sign language tutors to reshape the future of education and work.
items.summary: 滑铁卢大学的学生开发了包括手语导师在内的AI原型，旨在重塑教育和工作的未来。这些原型展示了Futures Lab的成果，为未来技术发展提供了实际案例。

items.title: Catch up on 12 major I/O 2026 moments
items.content: Here are 12 of the biggest Google I/O 2026 keynote moments, including news about Gemini Omni, Gemini 3.5 Flash and more.
items.contentSnippet: Here are 12 of the biggest Google I/O 2026 keynote moments, including news about Gemini Omni, Gemini 3.5 Flash and more.
items.summary: Google I/O 2026发布会重点介绍了12项关键信息，涵盖Gemini Omni、Gemini 3.5 Flash等重大更新。

items.title: Travel the world like Dua Lipa with Google Maps
items.content: 12 shared lists in Google Maps are packed with Dua’s favorite spots for food, shopping, culture and more.
items.contentSnippet: 12 shared lists in Google Maps are packed with Dua’s favorite spots for food, shopping, culture and more.
items.summary: 谷歌地图分享了12个包含杜娃·黎波喜爱地点的列表，涵盖美食、购物、文化等多方面，方便用户像杜娃·黎波一样环游世界。

items.title: Here's how AI is rebuilding the foundation of modern marketing.
items.content: The finale of Ads Decoded, recorded live at Google Marketing Live 2026, features the teams behind the day’s biggest announcements.
items.contentSnippet: The finale of Ads Decoded, recorded live at Google Marketing Live 2026, features the teams behind the day’s biggest announcements.
items.summary: 《Ads Decoded》在Google Marketing Live 2026现场录制收官，展示了当日重大宣布背后的团队。活动聚焦AI如何重塑现代营销基础，通过技术革新推动营销策略与效果提升。

items.title: New ways to find your favorite sources and original content in AI Search
items.content: New updates to help you spot and connect with high-quality, original content in Google Search.
items.contentSnippet: New updates to help you spot and connect with high-quality, original content in Google Search.
items.summary: 谷歌搜索推出新更新，旨在帮助用户识别和连接高质量原创内容。此次升级通过优化算法和搜索结果排序，使用户更容易找到可信、独特的资料来源，提升信息获取效率和质量。

items.title: Dive deeper into I/O 2026 with NotebookLM.
items.content: Find out what you might have missed and go deeper on all the big announcements from Google I/O 2026 using NotebookLM.
items.contentSnippet: Find out what you might have missed and go deeper on all the big announcements from Google I/O 2026 using NotebookLM.
items.summary: 使用NotebookLM深入了解Google I/O 2026的重要发布和可能遗漏的内容。

items.title: Drive with Ziggy Marley on Waze.
items.content: Looking for some good vibes on your next drive? We teamed up with musician Ziggy Marley to bring his signature calming energy to Waze. To celebrate his new album, “Brigh…
items.contentSnippet: Looking for some good vibes on your next drive? We teamed up with musician Ziggy Marley to bring his signature calming energy to Waze. To celebrate his new album, “Brigh…
items.summary: Waze与音乐人Ziggy Marley合作，将他的标志性平静能量融入导航应用中，以庆祝其新专辑《Brigh…》的发布。此举旨在为用户带来愉悦的驾驶体验。

items.title: Google Display Ads has a new home in Demand Gen.
items.content: Display advertisers can still serve ads exclusively on the Google Display Network while unlocking more streamlined campaign management.
items.contentSnippet: Display advertisers can still serve ads exclusively on the Google Display Network while unlocking more streamlined campaign management.
items.summary: 谷歌展示广告已迁至需求生成平台。广告主仍可专享在谷歌展示网络上投放广告，同时获得更简化的广告活动管理功能。

items.title: Google Health brings your data into one place, on your terms
items.content: We designed the Google Health App to bring your data into one secure place, no matter what device you use.
items.contentSnippet: We designed the Google Health App to bring your data into one secure place, no matter what device you use.
items.summary: 谷歌健康应用旨在将您的数据安全地整合到一个地方，无论您使用何种设备。该应用允许用户在个人设定的条件下管理健康数据，确保数据集中且安全。

items.title: Catch up on the Dialogues stage at Google I/O 2026.
items.content: A recap of the 2026 I/O Dialogues, where leaders discuss the future of AI, quantum computing, robotics and creativity.
items.contentSnippet: A recap of the 2026 I/O Dialogues, where leaders discuss the future of AI, quantum computing, robotics and creativity.
items.summary: 2026年谷歌I/O对话环节回顾，多位领导者探讨了人工智能、量子计算、机器人和创造力等领域的未来发展趋势。

items.title: Here's what developers can do with the latest Google Play updates.
items.content: At Google I/O, we introduced new ways for developers to expand their reach and scale their business with less complexity.We’re expanding their reach by meeting users whe…
items.contentSnippet: At Google I/O, we introduced new ways for developers to expand their reach and scale their business with less complexity.We’re expanding their reach by meeting users whe…
items.summary: 谷歌在Google I/O大会上推出了新功能，帮助开发者通过降低复杂性来扩大用户覆盖面和扩展业务。这些更新旨在通过在用户可能遇到的地方与他们互动，提升开发者的业务规模和影响力。

items.title: Here's how accessibility tools and Gemini are helping students find independence
items.content: How a school division eliminated barriers for students by adopting Face control — an accessibility feature built into every Chromebook.
items.contentSnippet: How a school division eliminated barriers for students by adopting Face control — an accessibility feature built into every Chromebook.
items.summary: 某学区通过采用Chromebook内置的Face控制功能，消除了学生面临的障碍，帮助学生实现独立性。

items.title: We’re announcing the first Texas Energy Impact Fund recipients.
items.content: The Texas Energy Impact Fund announced its first grant recipients from its $30 million commitment to energy efficiency in the Lone Star State.
items.contentSnippet: The Texas Energy Impact Fund announced its first grant recipients from its $30 million commitment to energy efficiency in the Lone Star State.
items.summary: 德克萨斯能源影响基金宣布其首笔拨款Recipient，该基金承诺向该州能源效率项目投入3000万美元。

items.title: We’re partnering with U.S. Soccer to bring fans closer to the action with Search.
items.content: Soccer is the most searched sport in the world, and U.S. fans’ passion is reaching new heights. To fuel that excitement, we’re partnering with the U.S. Men’s and Women’s…
items.contentSnippet: Soccer is the most searched sport in the world, and U.S. fans’ passion is reaching new heights. To fuel that excitement, we’re partnering with the U.S. Men’s and Women’s…
items.summary: 我们与美国足球协会合作，通过搜索引擎让球迷更近距离感受足球魅力。作为全球最受搜索的运动，美国球迷的热情持续高涨，此次合作旨在进一步点燃这份热情，提升球迷体验。

items.title: We’re announcing new community investments in Missouri.
items.content: We’re helping build the state’s next-generation workforce and investing in energy programs.
items.contentSnippet: We’re helping build the state’s next-generation workforce and investing in energy programs.
items.summary: 我们将投资密苏里州的新一代劳动力建设，并支持能源项目。此举旨在提升该州产业发展和能源发展水平。

items.title: 100 things we announced at I/O 2026
items.content: We've been busy! Here’s a rundown of the top announcements, launches and demos at I/O 2026.
items.contentSnippet: We've been busy! Here’s a rundown of the top announcements, launches and demos at I/O 2026.
items.summary: I/O 2026活动发布了多项重要公告、新产品和演示。内容涵盖最新技术成果和业务进展，展示了公司的创新方向和重点领域。

items.title: A new experiment brings better group meetings to Google Beam
items.content: See and hear your colleagues in true-to-life size and sound, making hybrid meetings feel more inclusive and connected.
items.contentSnippet: See and hear your colleagues in true-to-life size and sound, making hybrid meetings feel more inclusive and connected.
items.summary: 谷歌Beam推出新实验，通过逼真的尺寸和声音效果，让远程同事在混合会议中感觉更融入和连接，提升会议体验。

items.title: How we’re helping retailers thrive with new Universal Commerce Protocol features and AI tools on Google
items.content: New UCP-powered features and AI tools will create a more intuitive, agentic shopping experience for consumers and retailers.
items.contentSnippet: New UCP-powered features and AI tools will create a more intuitive, agentic shopping experience for consumers and retailers.
items.summary: 谷歌推出新的通用商业协议（UCP）功能和人工智能工具，旨在为消费者和零售商创造更直观、自主的购物体验，助力零售商发展。
